requirements.task_name: Save 3 recent devotionals about anxiety under 10 minutes to your reading list
requirements.task_description: Find daily devotionals on the topic of anxiety, filter them to those published within the last 12 months and with a reading time of 10 minutes or less, then add the first 3 matching devotionals to your personal reading list.
existing_variables: devotionals
// used to verify topic_tags, reading_time_minutes, date_published for each devotional
reading_lists
// to locate the user’s reading list (the SDK always creates/uses the first one)
reading_list_items
// to find which devotional_ids were actually saved (status !== 'removed', added_at)

requirements.task_name: Reserve seats for a 9:00 AM Sunday service for your family
requirements.task_description: Find the next upcoming Sunday 9:00 AM service and submit a reservation for 3 people (2 adults and 1 child age 7), selecting a front-section seating preference.
existing_variables: sunday_services
// to find all services, determine which are Sunday at 9:00 AM, and identify the next upcoming one by start_datetime
service_reservations
// to confirm a reservation exists for that service with num_adults=2, num_children=1, children_ages including 7, seating_preference indicating front section

requirements.task_name: Create a 30-day Old Testament Bible reading plan starting on June 1, 2026 with daily reminders
requirements.task_description: Set up a custom Bible reading plan that covers only Old Testament passages, lasts 30 days, starts on June 1, 2026, assigns 4 chapters per day, and enables daily reminder notifications at 7:00 AM.
existing_variables: bible_reading_plans

// to find a plan with content_scope='old_testament', duration_days=30, chapters_per_day=4, start_date corresponding to 2026-06-01, daily_reminder_enabled=true, daily_reminder_time='07:00' (or equivalent)
reading_plan_days
// optionally to confirm 30 generated days exist for that plan

requirements.task_name: Submit an anonymous health-related prayer request and opt into the weekly prayer newsletter
requirements.task_description: Use the prayer request form to submit a request categorized as Health, mark it as anonymous, and opt in to receive the weekly prayer newsletter.
existing_variables: prayer_requests
// to locate a request with category='health' (or equivalent), is_anonymous=true, newsletter_opt_in=true, status='submitted'
newsletter_subscriptions
// to confirm a subscription with newsletter_type='weekly_prayer', is_subscribed=true was created

requirements.task_name: Make a one-time $50 donation to the Missions Fund and cover the 2.5% processing fee
requirements.task_description: Complete a donation form to give a one-time $50 gift to the Missions Fund, choose to cover a 2.5% processing fee, pay by credit card, and mark the donation as given in honor of someone.
existing_variables: donation_funds
// to find the 'Missions Fund' (or closest missions-related) and its id
donations

// to confirm a record with that fund_id, amount=50, frequency='one_time', cover_processing_fee=true, processing_fee_percent=2.5, payment_method='credit_card', dedication_type='in_honor_of' (or equivalent), dedication_name='John Smith', status='succeeded'

requirements.task_name: Join an online Wednesday small group for young adults that starts the soonest
requirements.task_description: Find online small groups aimed at young adults, filter to groups that meet on Wednesdays between 6:00 PM and 8:00 PM, and register for the one with the earliest upcoming start date.
existing_variables: small_groups
// to filter groups where audience='young_adults', meeting_format='online', meeting_day='wednesday', meeting_time_start between '18:00' and '20:00', and to identify the earliest start_date among them
group_registrations
// to verify a registration exists (status not 'cancelled') for that earliest-starting small_group_id, with sample contact data

requirements.task_name: Add the highest-rated recent forgiveness sermon under 35 minutes to your watch later list
requirements.task_description: Search the sermon library for sermons about forgiveness, filter to those from the last 2 years with at least a 4.5 star rating and a duration under 35 minutes, then add the highest-rated one to your Watch Later playlist.
existing_variables: sermons
// to filter by topics including 'forgiveness', date_published in last 2 years, rating_average >= 4.5, duration_minutes <= 35, and to identify the highest-rated among them
watch_later_lists
// to locate the user's Watch Later list (SDK always creates/uses the first one)
watch_later_items
// to confirm the sermon_id of that highest-rated qualifying sermon is present in the watch later list

requirements.task_name: Add 2 marriage books under $20 and 1 free devotional resource to your cart with free shipping
requirements.task_description: Use the resources or store section to add two physical books about marriage priced under $20 each and one free devotional resource to your cart, then select a free shipping option if available for orders over $30.
existing_variables: resource_categories
// to identify marriage-related categories (e.g., name containing 'Marriage', 'Family & Marriage') and devotional/free-resource categories
products
// to verify for cart items: price <= 20, is_physical_shippable=true, type/format indicates 'book' for the marriage books, and is_free=true for the devotional resource
carts
// to locate the active cart and confirm its status
cart_items
// to see which product_ids (and quantities) are in the active cart, tied back to products
shipping_options
// to know which options are free or become free above a minimum order total (code='free_shipping' or is_free=true, min_order_total_for_free)
orders
// optionally, if checkout is completed, to see final shipping_option_id and totals
order_items
// optionally, to see which products were in the final order

// Note: getCartSummary / setCartShippingOption-driven state (applied_shipping_option and cart.shipping_option_id) allows confirming that a free shipping option was selected and applied when eligible.
